title: Garlicky Chicken and Pasta
description: A crowd-pleasing dish that combines the flavors of chicken and garlic with the comfort of pasta.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken wings with salt and pepper.
3. Heat 2 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken wings to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Transfer the chicken wings to a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. While the chicken is cooking, cook the Polish Pasta according to package instructions.
7. In a large skillet, sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
8. Add the cooked chicken wings to the skillet and toss with garlic.
9. Combine the cooked pasta and garlic chicken in a large serving dish.
